description: A darkened, color-muted reproduction of a painting showing colonial-era women sewing an early American flag with a circle of stars in a candlelit room, while a child holds part of the flag. Small italic text at the top reads 'Protectors of the Homeland', and large white text across the lower portion reads 'Americans Are DEFENDERS OF LIBERTY'.
notable_text: Protectors of the Homeland; Americans Are DEFENDERS OF LIBERTY
